messages.content: Disculpa, el sistema de citas está fallando un poco, pero no te preocupes, un asesor te llamará enseguida para agendar.

function.name: checkCalendarAvailability
function.description: Call this ONLY if the patient explicitly asks what times are available. There is no live calendar connection, so this does NOT return real open slots — it returns an instruction to ask the patient which day and rough time they prefer. Never state or imply that a specific time is available.

messages.content: Hubo un pequeño error al guardar la cita, pero no te preocupes, te llamaremos para confirmarla manualmente.

function.name: bookAppointment
function.description: Record the patient's REQUESTED appointment time and contact details after they state which day and time they prefer. This logs a request for the clinic's team to confirm — it does NOT book or confirm anything. Never tell the patient the appointment is booked, confirmed, or guaranteed.

patient_name.description: The full name of the patient.

phone_number.description: The phone number of the patient in E.164 format (+1...).

appointment_date_time.description: The patient's requested appointment date and time in ISO 8601 format (e.g. 2026-06-20T10:00:00Z). Required — if the patient has not given a specific day and time, ask before calling this tool.
